payload.task:
Execute Morning Intelligence Workflow v1.0 for today.

OBJECTIVE: Generate and deliver morning briefing to Discord channels.

DATA COLLECTION (use researcher subagent if needed):
1. Fetch AI/Tech/Startup news (headlines + why they matter)
2. Fetch global events ONLY if impacting: Technology, Markets, Regulation, Macroeconomy (exclude generic world news)
3. Fetch 1 meaningful historical event for today (On This Day)
4. Read Gmail inbox: unread OR last 24h, max 10 emails
   - Classify: newsletters vs Itaú finance emails
5. Read /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/dashboard/personal_tasks.md

MUSIC GENERATION:
1. Read /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/dashboard/music_profile.md
2. Read /home/manpac/.openclaw/workspace/dashboard/music_history.jsonl for de-duplication
3. Generate 6-8 music recommendations:
   - 5-6 electronic (tech house / minimal / deep house, reference: Tuccillo 'The Waves')
   - 1-2 adjacent picks
   - Strict de-dupe: no artist or track already in history
   - Prefer niche/underground, avoid mainstream/chart pop
4. For each: Track — Artist, 1 reason (why it matches), 1 listening context
5. Append each recommendation to music_history.jsonl as JSONL:
   {"timestamp":"YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ","artist":"...","title":"...","source":"morning_intel","notes":""}

DISCORD DELIVERY (in order):

Channel 1: briefings (1475961144416931931)
# 🌅 Morning Intel — YYYY-MM-DD
---
## 🚀 AI / Tech & Global Signals
[for each: what happened / why it matters / implications]
---
## 📜 On This Day
[event + long-term significance]
---
## 📝 Your Tasks
### Pending ...
### In Progress ...
---
## 🤖 What I Can Execute Today
[3-5 concrete actions]

Channel 2: newsletters (1475961125257351423)
# 📰 Newsletter Digest — YYYY-MM-DD
[synthesize insights, group by topic, avoid listing every email]
If none: 'No new newsletters in the last 24h.'

Channel 3: finance (1475961220216520887) - ONLY if Itaú emails exist
# 💳 Finance Snapshot — YYYY-MM-DD
[visible totals, notable expenses, unusual changes]
If attachment-only: state clearly

Channel 4: music (1475961199207251968)
# 🎧 Music Radar — YYYY-MM-DD
[6-8 recommendations with artist, reason, context]

RULES:
- Use Discord Markdown (no tables, use bullet lists)
- Split messages if exceeding Discord limits
- Generate all content first, then send in order
- DO NOT use Codex models
- Prefer cost-efficient OpenRouter models
- Respect token caps

OUTPUT: Confirm delivery to all channels.
payload.label: morning-intel
